title: Donald Trump joins TikTok after trying to ban it
shortDescription: Former president Donald Trump posted his debut video on TikTok Saturday, garnering millions of followers in days. He once tried to ban the app in US.

title: Despite conviction, Trump vows to fight on | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: President Joe Biden said Israel has offered a new cease-fire proposal. Some pro-Palestinian protesters say schools are withholding diplomas.

title: Maldives to ban Israelis from entering its country amid war in Gaza
shortDescription: The island nation in South Asia announced it would ban people with an Israeli passport from entering, along with plans to fundraise for Palestinians.

title: Hunter Biden's jury selection begins today. Could you be impartial?
shortDescription: Joe Biden has been in the public eye for nearly 55 years. How will the ubiquitousness of the Biden family in Delaware play out selecting a jury?

title: Daily Briefing: From a Trump trial to a Biden trial
shortDescription: A federal gun charge trial against Hunter Biden begins and more news to know Monday.

title: Poll workers help run elections. Here's what it looks like inside

title: The future of Nevada elections hinges on these two Reno-area races
shortDescription: Two elections will determine who takes control of a small board in Nevada with big impact on state and national elections starting in 2025.

title: Mexico picks its first female, Jewish president in historic election
shortDescription: A majority Catholic country known for its macho culture, where women couldn't vote until 1953, has elected a Jewish woman as president.

title: Hunter Biden trial live updates: Joe Biden offers 'love and support'
shortDescription: First lady Jill Biden has joined Hunter Biden's wife and sister at the trial in a show of support. Follow the USA TODAY Network's live coverage.

title: Senate to vote on bill that would protect access to contraception this week
shortDescription: Republican senators have previously dismissed the effort as a political messaging bill.

title: The people and places that will play a pivotal role in Hunter Biden's trial
shortDescription: Hunter Biden's criminal trial on gun charges stems from an odd incident outside of a grocery store and will feature many Delaware witnesses.

title: RNC chair Lara Trump criticizes GOP candidate over comments on Trump verdict
shortDescription: Former GOP Maryland Gov. Larry Hogan is running to fill the open Senate seat in his state.

title: Netanyahu aide says Biden's Gaza plan isn't 'a good deal,' but Israel accepts it
shortDescription: An aide to Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu confirmed on Sunday that Israel had accepted a framework deal for winding down the Gaza war.

title: Hunter Biden trial: Why his gun case hinges on one fateful drug-free day
shortDescription: Hunter Biden's federal gun case may hinge on the legal interpretation of the word 'addict' and whether he used drugs on a specific day in 2018.

title: Will Donald Trump use the Justice Department to go after rivals? He won't say.

title: Hunter Biden's trials may include ex-wife's lawsuit over alimony
shortDescription: The son of President Joe Biden is scheduled to begin trial Monday on federal gun charges; a tax case is scheduled to start on Sept. 5.

title: White House Grandma: Obama family pays tribute to Marian Robinson
shortDescription: Marian Robinson kept a low profile as she helped care for the Obama family and their daughters during their time in the White House.

title: After verdict, poll shows some Republicans less likely to back Trump
shortDescription: The poll found that 56% of Republican registered voters said the case would have no effect on their vote.

title: Donald Trump says he raised nearly $53 million after his conviction
shortDescription: Trump and his aides claim his criminal conviction will trigger a backlash among voters

title: Voters question Hunter Biden trials as President stands by his son
shortDescription: As President Joe Biden gears up for the November election, he must first make his way through his son's criminal trials in Delaware and California.

title: Donald Trump's conviction has landmark impact on American history
shortDescription: Trump is the first former U.S. president convicted of a crime. Here's what the verdict in his New York trial means for his legacy and U.S. history.

title: Trump's state verdict can't be pardoned by Biden | Fact check
shortDescription: A president only has the constitutional power to pardon a federal offense. Trump's verdict in the 34-count indictment is at the New York state level.
